knot_assessments.notes: Proper surgeon's knot with double wrap visible and well-executed
Single throw with proper hand switching, knot tight
Final single throw completing knot sequence without slippage

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Slit properly closed with no visible gaps after knot tightening

technique_summary: Teachers disagreed on completion time (180s vs 150s) and suture placement accuracy. Claude noted video quality issues with title screen overlay affecting assessment, while GPT-4o provided more confident scoring. Consensus favors middle ground on penalties and timings. Both agreed on proper knot sequence with surgeon's knot first throw and appropriate hand switching.
improvement_suggestions: Focus on more precise suture placement to minimize deviation from marks
Improve speed while maintaining accuracy to reduce completion time
Ensure uninterrupted video recording for complete assessment
strengths: Proper surgeon's knot formation on first throw
Good knot tying technique with secure results
Effective slit closure with no gaps
